beginner.name: Cordless Drill/Driver
beginner.why: Essential for every project. Get a 20V with multiple speed settings.

beginner.name: Circular Saw
beginner.why: Cuts plywood, 2x4s, and sheet goods. More portable than a table saw.

beginner.name: Random Orbital Sander
beginner.why: Smooth finishes without swirl marks. Essential for any finishing work.

beginner.name: Tape Measure (25ft)
beginner.why: Measure twice, cut once. Get one with a magnetic tip.

beginner.name: Combination Square
beginner.why: Mark 90-degree and 45-degree angles accurately.

beginner.name: Clamps (set of 4)
beginner.why: You can never have too many clamps. Start with 6" bar clamps.

intermediate.name: Router (Plunge/Fixed)
intermediate.why: Edge profiles, dadoes, rabbets. A game-changer for joinery.

intermediate.name: Miter Saw (10")
intermediate.why: Precise crosscuts and angle cuts. Essential for trim and framing.

intermediate.name: Pocket Hole Jig
intermediate.why: Strong hidden joints without complex joinery skills.

intermediate.name: Brad Nailer
intermediate.why: Fast trim work and assembly. 18-gauge handles most projects.

advanced.name: Table Saw
advanced.why: The backbone of a serious workshop. Rip cuts, crosscuts, dados.

advanced.name: Thickness Planer
advanced.why: Mill rough lumber to exact thickness. Saves money on materials.

advanced.name: Bandsaw (14")
advanced.why: Resawing, curves, and veneer cutting. Versatile and safer than a table saw.

beginner.name: Cordless Drill/Driver
beginner.why: Hanging shelves, assembling furniture, basic repairs.

beginner.name: Stud Finder
beginner.why: Find wall studs before hanging anything heavy.

beginner.name: Level (24")
beginner.why: Ensures everything hangs straight.

beginner.name: Putty Knife Set
beginner.why: Drywall patching, scraping, and filling.

beginner.name: Utility Knife
beginner.why: Cutting drywall, flooring, tape, and materials.

intermediate.name: Oscillating Multi-Tool
intermediate.why: Flush cuts, sanding tight corners, removing grout.

intermediate.name: Reciprocating Saw
intermediate.why: Demolition, cutting pipes, and rough carpentry.

intermediate.name: Paint Sprayer (HVLP)
intermediate.why: Professional-quality paint finish in less time.

advanced.name: Laser Level (Self-Leveling)
advanced.why: Perfect lines for tile, cabinets, and framing.

advanced.name: Tile Saw (7")
advanced.why: Clean tile cuts for bathroom and kitchen renovations.

beginner.name: Soldering Iron Kit
beginner.why: Temperature-controlled for consistent joints.

beginner.name: Digital Multimeter
beginner.why: Measure voltage, current, resistance. Diagnose circuits.

beginner.name: Arduino Starter Kit
beginner.why: Learn electronics with hands-on projects.

beginner.name: Breadboard & Jumper Wires
beginner.why: Prototype circuits without soldering.

beginner.name: Wire Strippers
beginner.why: Clean wire preparation for reliable connections.

intermediate.name: Raspberry Pi 5 Kit
intermediate.why: Home server, media center, smart home hub.

intermediate.name: 3D Printer
intermediate.why: Print custom enclosures, parts, and prototypes.

intermediate.name: Heat Gun
intermediate.why: Heat shrink tubing, component removal, plastics work.

beginner.name: Heat Gun (Dual Temp)
beginner.why: Embossing, resin work, paint stripping.

beginner.name: Resin Kit (Starter)
beginner.why: Everything you need for first epoxy projects.

beginner.name: Candle Making Kit
beginner.why: Wax, wicks, fragrance oils, and containers.

beginner.name: Chalk Paint
beginner.why: No-prep furniture painting and upcycling.
